cases.focus: theme package source files, fixture theme files, and candidate Haxe adapter-contract artifacts are present
front-end theme request observes template include, global styles, nav menu, sidebar widget, and body classes
singular front-end request observes single template, post title, nav menu, widget, and canonical theme state
installed-style global styles endpoint records theme.json settings, CSS variables, and stylesheet handles
admin themes screen observes active theme, available theme metadata, theme support, and admin hooks
admin Customizer screen observes settings, controls, sections, changeset UUID, and selective refresh partials
admin widgets route mutates deterministic sidebar/widget state and records update hooks
admin nav menus route assigns deterministic menu location and records menu update hooks

remaining_gaps.detail: This gate packages copied WordPress public PHP theme/customizer/widget/nav-menu files and Haxe adapter-contract artifacts. It does not replace those public files with generated original-path PHP.

This installed-style HTTP gate uses deterministic router state. Full database-backed installed theme rendering, Customizer UI, widget/nav-menu persistence, and user global styles remain later distribution work.
Selected upstream PHPUnit groups for themes, template hierarchy, theme JSON/global styles, widgets, nav menus, and Customizer behavior remain separate ratchet gates.
